name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement to the library

## Problem

What are you trying to do that the library does not currently support?

## Proposed solution

Describe the API or behavior you would like. Where relevant, reference the RSS 2.0
or Apple Podcasts (iTunes) spec element involved.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds or alternative approaches you have thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else that would help, such as example feed output.
